data.body: Pre-warmed all remaining plan-reviews: 6755 PASS, 0435 PASS; BLOCKs on 9d81(awk unbounded), f088(manual-verify AC), e866(wrong source-of-truth: CLI surface is _cli/help/*.txt known_subcommands() not _commands; ~50 cmds across 3 locations), 235a(list_tools broken - write tools conditionally registered; sign_review is a write-gated hybrid in llm registrar; needs build_server with gates off + explicit classification), b5a4(refs non-existent docs-link gate + subjective 'stands alone'). Remediated 9d81(bounded awk to Historical section), f088(deterministic CAUGHT proofs; decoupled from archive since 9d81 no longer moves files), b5a4(deterministic ACs, self-contained link check, depends_on f088). Dispatched subagent to nail e866/235a generator APIs. Re-reviewing 9d81/f088/b5a4.
